description: Fix rendering pipeline so Cloudflare blog page visually matches Chrome reference PDF. Covers image display, background colors, max-width centering, code block styling, link colors, and inline code styling.

userStories.title: Extract img src attribute and flow through to C# rendering
userStories.description: As a browser user, I want images to appear on the page so that the rendered page matches what Chrome shows.
acceptanceCriteria: In page_layout.rs build_layout_tree_from_dom(), capture el.attr('src') for tags and store as __img_src in styles.other
Ensure img elements are NOT skipped by the SKIP_TAGS list or inline element classification — they should be processed as block elements with their src attribute
In collect_visual_data(), the existing img_src extraction from __img_src already works — verify it finds the new data
cargo build succeeds with no errors
dotnet build gui/ThaloraBrowser succeeds with no errors
Launch browser on https://blog.cloudflare.com/markdown-for-agents/, take screenshot, confirm image placeholders appear (C# ImageCache already handles downloading)
userStories.notes: Added img src, alt, width, height capture in build_layout_tree_from_dom after apply_ua_defaults

userStories.title: Debug and fix background-color pipeline end-to-end
userStories.description: As a browser user, I want elements with CSS background-color to render with colored backgrounds so code blocks, headers, and styled sections appear correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: In css.rs apply_declarations(), verify background-color values are being parsed and stored in ComputedStyles.background_color for elements that have them in the stylesheet
In page_layout.rs, verify background_color from ComputedStyles flows into LayoutElement.styles.background_color
In layout.rs extract_layout(), verify background_color from ComputedStyles is copied to ElementLayout.background_color
Add UA default styles: <pre> gets background-color #f4f4f4, <code> inside <pre> inherits it
In HtmlRenderer.cs BuildComputedStyle(), verify BackgroundColor from JSON is applied to CssComputedStyle
In PaintContext.cs PaintBox(), verify background color is painted as a filled rectangle before painting children
cargo build succeeds
dotnet build gui/ThaloraBrowser succeeds
Launch browser, take screenshot — code blocks should have gray (#f4f4f4) backgrounds

userStories.title: Fix max-width and margin:auto centering
userStories.description: As a browser user, I want content containers with max-width and margin:auto to be horizontally centered, so the main article body appears centered like in Chrome.
acceptanceCriteria: In layout.rs, verify max-width from CSS is set as taffy max_size.width on the node
In layout.rs, verify margin:auto is translated to taffy's margin auto values (not just flags)
In layout.rs extract_layout(), the margin_left_auto and margin_right_auto flags are already set — verify they work
In HtmlRenderer.cs or PaintContext.cs, if taffy doesn't center automatically, calculate left offset = (parent_width - element_width) / 2 when both margin_left_auto and margin_right_auto are true
cargo build succeeds
dotnet build gui/ThaloraBrowser succeeds
Launch browser, take screenshot — main article content should be centered with ~720px width, not spanning full 1280px

userStories.title: Style code blocks with monospace font, background, and padding
userStories.description: As a browser user, I want <pre> and <code> blocks to render with monospace font, gray background, and padding so they look like code blocks.
acceptanceCriteria: In page_layout.rs UA defaults section, add: <pre> gets font-family 'Fira Mono', background-color #f4f4f4, padding 16px, overflow hidden, border-radius 4px
In page_layout.rs UA defaults, add: <code> gets font-family 'Fira Mono', font-size 0.9em relative to parent
Inline <code> (not inside <pre>) gets background-color #f0f0f0, padding 2px 4px, border-radius 3px
The monospace font maps to bundled Fira Mono in both Rust text_measure.rs and C# HtmlRenderer.cs
cargo build succeeds
dotnet build gui/ThaloraBrowser succeeds
Launch browser, take screenshot — code blocks have gray background and monospace font

userStories.title: Add default link color styling
userStories.description: As a browser user, I want links (<a> tags) to appear in blue so they are visually distinct from plain text.
acceptanceCriteria: In page_layout.rs UA defaults section, add: <a> gets color #0051C3 (Cloudflare-style blue) as a default when no CSS color is specified
Links that have explicit CSS color from the stylesheet should keep their CSS color (don't override)
The color flows through the existing pipeline: ComputedStyles.color -> ElementLayout.color -> C# CssComputedStyle.Color -> PaintContext text color
cargo build succeeds
dotnet build gui/ThaloraBrowser succeeds
Launch browser, take screenshot — links appear in blue

userStories.title: Fix flexbox horizontal layout for navigation
userStories.description: As a browser user, I want flex containers with row direction to lay out children horizontally so navigation bars display correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: In layout.rs, verify that display:flex elements get taffy Display::Flex (not Display::Block)
In layout.rs, verify flex-direction:row is the default for flex containers (taffy default)
In layout.rs, verify child elements of flex containers get proper flex item styles (flex-grow, flex-shrink, flex-basis)
Flex children should appear side-by-side horizontally, not stacked vertically
cargo build succeeds
dotnet build gui/ThaloraBrowser succeeds
Launch browser, take screenshot — top navigation items appear in a horizontal row

userStories.title: Capture and compare screenshots against reference
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to run the capture script and visually compare all viewports against the PDF reference images to verify rendering improvements.
acceptanceCriteria: Run gui/ThaloraBrowser/visual-tests/scripts/capture_screenshots.sh to capture fresh viewport screenshots
Compare viewport-01.png against references/cloudflare-blog/page-01.png — content should be centered, images visible, links colored
Compare viewport-03.png against page-03.png — code blocks should have gray background and monospace font
Update gui/ThaloraBrowser/visual-tests/rendering-issues.md with status of each issue (FIXED or remaining notes)
cargo build succeeds
dotnet build gui/ThaloraBrowser succeeds
